hero.title: Hello, I'm
hero.name: Zheng Xuan
hero.subtitle:
Master's in Educational Technology • Bachelor's in Software Engineering
MoE Registered Instructor helping 130+ students aged 4–16 build strong computational thinking, creativity, and confidence through coding, robotics, and AI.

stats.retentionTooltip: 95% of students continue learning beyond 6 months
stats.championTooltip:
1× Overall Champion Award
2× Best Coding Award
1× Best Teamwork Award

empire.desc: Full-time trainer delivering coding and robotics programs with AI integration. Teaching students aged 6-16 various programming languages and robotics fundamentals.

tasks: Taught Scratch, Python and LEGO robotics to over 30 students
Guided 3 students from beginner to graduation over 2 years
Coached teams that won Overall Champion and Best Coding Awards
Conducted lessons in English, Mandarin, and Malay

workshop1.title: PictoBlox with AI
workshop1.desc: Block-based coding with AI, facial & speech recognition.

workshop2.title: Google Slides & Canva
workshop2.desc: Creating engaging presentations with design tools.

workshop3.title: Minecraft Education
workshop3.desc: Designing sustainable eco-spaces in Ang Mo Kio.

outcomes.title: Learning Journeys & Outcomes
outcomes.subtitle: Real growth stories from students I have taught

case1.title: From Reluctant to Confident Coder
case1.desc: An 8-year-old who was initially afraid of computers and refused to try coding gradually became engaged through block-based programming and storytelling projects.
case1.result1: Completed his first interactive story project independently
case1.result2: Gained confidence and continued learning for over 8 months

case2.title: Building First Robot from Scratch
case2.desc: Guided a group of 12–13-year-olds with no prior competition experience to build and program their first LEGO robot from scratch.
case2.result1: Built and programmed their robot, and practiced presentation skills
case2.result2: Developed problem-solving skills and an engineering mindset, and achieved Overall Champio

case3.title: Understanding AI Responsibly
case3.desc: Introduced AI concepts to 9–12 year olds using age-appropriate tools, focusing on both creative applications and ethical considerations.
case3.result1: Students could explain basic AI concepts in their own words
case3.result2: Developed critical thinking about technology's impact on society
